13652871433.title: Food People Chilled Western Pork Lard
13652871433.detail_text: About Product Food People Western Pork Lard is made from carefully rendered premium pork fat, following a traditional Western-style process to produce a clean, smooth, and aromatic lard with excellent cooking performance. The texture is creamy and firm at room temperature, melting evenly when heated to deliver rich flavour and superior mouthfeel. This pork lard is highly versatile and suitable for a wide range of culinary applications. It is commonly used in Western baking and cooking, such as pastry crusts, biscuits, savoury pies, and roasted dishes, where it contributes flakiness, moisture, and depth of flavour. It is also ideal for frying, and stir-frying, helping ingredients develop a golden colour and enhanced aroma.

13652941226.title: Food People Chilled Western Duck Fat
13652941226.detail_text: About Product Food People Western Duck Fat is produced using carefully rendered premium duck fat, delivering a clean, golden appearance and rich, savoury aroma that elevates both home cooking and professional dishes. The fat has a smooth, silky texture and melts evenly when heated, releasing a distinctive depth of flavour that is highly prized in Western cuisine. Duck fat is especially well known for its ability to create exceptionally crispy exteriors while keeping the inside tender and juicy. It is widely used for roasting potatoes, vegetables, meats, and poultry, giving dishes a luxurious mouthfeel and restaurant-quality finish. Compared to standard cooking oils, duck fat provides superior flavour enhancement without overpowering the natural taste of ingredients.
